series_metadata.series_description: Record contains employer information necessary for determing, verifying and collecting unemployment taxes. File includes employer name, address, account number and other identifying information such as contribution rates, taxable wages and taxes due. File may contain, but is not limited to, field audit assignment correspondence, report to determine liability, rate determinations, lien notices, notices of failure to file, quarterly delinquent notice of employer account, disposition/acquisition of business forms, audits unallocated payment information authorizations, address/actuary authorization, assessment notice, disposition of business, audit questionnaire, refund claims and account information. Employer Resource Information Center (ERIC)/Filenet.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: enterprise which account was established is no longer in operation and its account has not been chargeable a period of seven years and there are no outstanding debts ; Microform: enterprise which account was established is no longer in operation and its account has not been chargeable a period of seven years and there are no outstanding debts ; Paper: 60 days hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), and quality control is complete
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
